name: Deshabilitar Widgets
description: Deshabilita el panel de Widgets de Windows 11 que consume recursos y bandwidth en segundo plano.

commands.apply: New-Item -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Dsh' -Force | Out-Null; Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Dsh' -Name 'AllowNewsAndInterests' -Value 0 -Type DWord; Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKCU:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Explorer' -Name 'DisableWidgets' -Value 1 -Type DWord
